content.1: **First time? Please read [Quick start](https://mpe.codax.site/docs/guide/start/quick-start.html) in full** **so you know how to use the editor.**
content.2: **LocalBridge🌉 stable is live**! Full **local document management**, **field quick-fill** (OCR, crop, etc.), and **pipeline debug** — **one-line install**. See [Local service docs](https://mpe.codax.site/docs/guide/server/deploy.html)
